cases.description: Asking about a user's access could map to permissions or roles — explicit mention of 'databases' should prefer userDbPermissions
cases.input: Which databases can the user 'bob' access and what can they do in each one?

cases.description: User asks about permissions without naming a user
Asking about a role's access should use sec_rolePermissions, not sec_userDbPermissions
cases.input: What access rights does the 'analyst' role have across all databases?

cases.description: Asking about a user's roles should prefer sec_userRoles even though permissions is related
cases.input: Tell me which roles have been assigned to user 'diana'

cases.description: Find a user's roles, then inspect one role's permissions
cases.input: Show me what roles 'alice' has, then list the permissions for her primary role
Show me what access rights jsmith has across all the different databases in the system.
What access rights are granted to the FinanceReporter role?
What security privileges and access levels have been granted to the database account jsmith?

cases.description: Agent must ask which role to inspect
cases.input: What access rights does the role have?

cases.description: Agent must ask which user to retrieve roles for
User asks for a non‑existent security tool
cases.input: List all audit logs for the last week
